purpose: Food pattern rules for Chiang Rai wellness food journey. No nutrition facts are claimed.
global_rules: Do not label foods as simply good or bad.
Explain food through balance, portion, frequency, spice tolerance, and cultural context.
Do not claim any food cures, treats, detoxes, or prevents disease.
If allergy or medical caution exists, be conservative and recommend professional guidance where appropriate.

meal_logic: mindful sticky rice or carbohydrate portion
patterns.coach_review: Coach Roi should select actual dishes and check sodium, oil, spice level, portion, and protein adequacy.
Coach Roi should check whether user is vegetarian/vegan or simply plant-forward. Ensure enough protein.

meal_logic: protein or fiber-containing snack if available
patterns.coach_review: Coach Roi should suggest specific drink modifications based on cafe menu.
Coach Roi should use only if food safety and user tolerance are appropriate.
